basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Associate (RA-I) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 19-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in VLSI Circuit Design and related domain.
qualification.details: Ph.D. in VLSI Circuit Design and related domain.

salary_details.details: Rs. 58000 Per Month + HRA as per rules

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Research Associate (RA-I) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 19-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Research Associate (RA-I) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Roorkee Research Associate (RA-I) Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Research Associate (RA-I) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 19-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Research Associate (RA-I) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate (RA-I) position at IIT Roorkee is 19th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in VLSI Circuit Design and a related domain to be eligible for the Research Associate (RA-I) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 58,000, along with HRA as per the institute's rules.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Associate (RA-I) post at IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate (RA-I) position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 247667.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position, as indicated in the job details.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
